creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
The subject has the category/portname, but putting part of the error log in there is ugly and unnecessary.  Better something like, "security/krb5 does not build" and leave the actual error in the build log.

In any case, it does build everywhere according to portsmon, so I'm closing the PR anyway:

http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=security&portname=krb5
